notes: Awaiting hand-keyed values from the named public source. The latest APS monthly workbook is discoverable programmatically via the data.gov.au CKAN package endpoint (dataset id d889484e-fb65-4190-a2e3-1739517cbf9b) but is published only as XLSX. Parsing XLSX is out of scope for the current fetcher runtime (stdlib + requests + pyyaml only). When populated: copy the Days of Net Import Cover series from the APS workbook's stocks/days-of-cover table, keep manual_entry true, set retrieved_at to the data-entry timestamp, and set status to ok.
